title: Casuistic
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Casuistic.jpg|thumb|250px|The ''Casuistic'' in the Corellian sector]]

The '''''Casuistic''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], likely manufactured by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]], at some point prior to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. At this time, [[Ekria/Legends|Ekria]] piloted the vessel through the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]], apparently to bury the last [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] she would ever know.

{{Ship-stub}}

*''[[Evasive Action: End Game]]''
